Bookmark rules: Sanitise bookmark names (remove spaces) because Word bookmark identifiers cannot contain spaces.
Move the DocumentBuilder cursor to the paragraph's last child before calling EndBookmark so the bookmark spans the whole paragraph.
Guard against a missing paragraph (null) before trying to create a bookmark.
Document merge/insert rules: Do not import non‑existent namespaces (e.g., Aspose.Words.Building).
DocumentBuilder resides in the Aspose.Words namespace; only import what is required.
Import the modified StructuredDocumentTag via Document.ImportNode, then cast the result back to StructuredDocumentTag.
Saving/Export rules: Use SaveFormat.Doc when you need DOC output to retain list‑restart information.
Use the SaveFormat enum from Aspose.Words.Saving when constructing ImageSaveOptions.
Ensure the PDF file path is correct relative to the executable or provide an absolute path.
Reference the Aspose.Words namespace for Document, SaveFormat, and PsSaveOptions.
Set SaveFormat property on PsSaveOptions (optional but clarifies intent).
